pain_point_label: Procurement Governance & Compliance Fragmentation Across Sites

matches.match_rationale: POs, invoices, and requisition approvals exist as PDFs and scanned documents scattered across campuses. OCR creates a centralized audit trail.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An ingestion pipeline that parses emailed invoices, scanned POs, and uploaded requisition forms into a central procurement register.

matches.match_rationale: Unauthorized purchases and invoice-without-PO scenarios are core risks that anomaly detection can flag.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A compliance monitoring layer scoring each invoice or PO against expected patterns and surfacing high-risk transactions.

matches.match_rationale: Requisition approvals in email threads and PO records in disparate systems need to be normalized into a unified schema.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A normalization service producing a standardized procurement dataset -- unified vendor registry, normalized PO history, mapped approval records.

matches.match_rationale: Procurement compliance enforcement requires multi-step workflows that a task automation agent can orchestrate.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A procurement workflow agent that validates requisitions against policy rules, routes for approvals, and logs every step.

matches.match_rationale: Drafting compliance reports and audit response letters from structured procurement data reduces manual burden.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A report generation module that drafts audit-ready compliance summaries and procurement reports on demand.
